hooks.command: node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));const c=(d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.command)||'';if(/rm\s+-rf\s+[\/~]|drop\s+table|truncate\s+table|:(){ :|:& };:/i.test(c)){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Destructive command detected -- use Plan Mode to review first.');process.exit(2)}"

node -e "const d=JSON.parse(require('fs').readFileSync('/dev/stdin','utf8'));const c=(d.tool_input&&d.tool_input.command)||'';if(/git\s+add.*\.(env|pem|key|secret|credentials|p12|pfx|jks)|git\s+add\s+-A|git\s+add\s+\./i.test(c)){process.stderr.write('BLOCKED: Staging sensitive files or using broad git add. Stage specific files instead.');process.exit(2)}"
